title: Pains Without Profit.
content:
A long life's-day I've taken pains
    For very little, or no gains;
    The evening's come, here now I'll stop,
    And work no more, but shut up shop.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Pains Without Profit."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
